case_title: I. G. PATEL VS. KELLY FUHLRODT et al

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, I. G.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, I. G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUHLRODT, KELLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1075 POST STREET, #207 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO $4,950.00 RENT, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,190.00, LEASE FORFEITED, OTHER: DEFENDANT NAMED IN ITEM 3A ABOVE MUST PAY PLAINTIFF $50.00 PER DAY FOR EACH DAY THAT DEFENDANT REMAINS IN THE PREMISES STATED IN ITEM 4 ABOVE AFTER THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT. calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Arnold W. Efje II, Esq., for the Plaintiff I. G. PATEL.
Witness: Plaintiff I. G. Patel sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant KELLY FUHLRODT.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1075 Post Street, #207, San Francisco, CA 94109.
Past-due rent $2,700.00
Holdover damages $2,250.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $240.00
for a Total Judgment of $5,190.00
Defendant must pay plaintiff $50.00 per day for each day that defendant remains in the premises stated after the date of entry of this judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Peter J. Busch; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff I.G. Patel is present.
Attorney Arnold Evje for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kelly Fuhlrodt DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of OCT-07-2013 remains on calendar. (D501)
